name: Chroma_Upsampling
operator_description: Upsamples chrominance components during JPEG decompression to restore full resolution from subsampled data. This module contains SIMD-optimized implementations for different upsampling methods and ratios: (1) Simple upsampling (h2v1, h2v2) by duplicating samples horizontally and/or vertically with 2:1 ratio; (2) Fancy upsampling (h1v2_fancy, h2v1_fancy, h2v2_fancy) using smooth interpolation with 3:1 blending ratio for better visual quality. The upsampling process reconstructs the full-resolution chroma components to match the luma component resolution, preparing the image for color space conversion.
